name: Luscious Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Sliced strawberries or mandarin orange segments (optional)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 300 degrees F. Spray a 9 inch springform pan with vegetable cooking spray. Place all ingredients, except yogurt topping and fruit, in food processor container; process until smooth. Pour into prepared pan and bake 35 minutes or until edges are set. Meanwhile, prepare topping. Carefully spread over cheesecake and continue baking for 5 minutes. Remove from oven to wire rack; cool completely. Cover and refrigerate until chilled. Remove side of pan. Serve with fruit if desired. Refrigerate leftovers.
Yogurt Topping
2/3 Cup plain nonfat yogurt
2 Tablespoons sugar
Stir together in small bowl until well blended.
